hfe0cd963g86e4g4b30gbc88g262b29306d94: Something's wrong. I feel... I feel...
h918296b8g5047g4827g9b98g312c9b0e1839: *Magic surges through your veins in a white-hot burst of agony.*
hc438fe18g3df8g4af6g82f0g113bc89d29a7: Squeeze your fists tight. Will the pain to subside.
h21d82983g840cg4f40gac3ag0acf22da0ab5: *The spasm of magic fades, but the scar on your arm throbs with a strange pain.*
h1363a497g6388g4342g91d8gf36e2df22fd2: We travel together. That makes it my business.
h07408ec5g3cb8g4ebfga96bgd295900ba399: And I heard what you said - you pray to Shar? The goddess of darkness...?
h4078b455g5946g4da3gb954g607f116b319e: No - you misheard me, that's all.
h2aaa5fbbga83cg42b3g8bdbg283f63684517: No, I don't think I did. You're not telling me the whole truth.
hfa896a50gcbcbg4792g9af7g3c1e4a39d8fa: I put a lot of trust in you, Shadowheart. Try not to break it.
hf83af3f6ga71fg4234gb958g86ae082486ca: I won't push you. Shar's faithful aren't exactly known for honesty.
h91363a9eg59b8g42adgaf0bg8b5ab6b52ec0: Would have liked to know that from the start. Bit too late for that, though, isn't it?
h3d47c4f0g0d52g40a4ga9ddg6d4193d0d4d9: It was just an exclamation - don't read too much into it.
hfdd98b83g6ad8g4d9agae67g9348129e4679: No, there's more. You're not telling me the whole truth, are you?
h0ff506bcg1522g4457gbc90gaf10cc7a767c: Everyone has secrets, but I thought you'd trust me. Maybe I was wrong.
h03df351eg8c29g4369g92f5gf57a3367ce16: But if it's a symptom of the tadpole...
hfa4c4745g1f93g481bgb0e7gc22454f98ba3: I'm fine. Whatever that was, it's passed.
h01e4c994g84afg4f7cg9703g64328cfac305: I don't like being stared at. I'm not sprouting tentacles or anything.
h892854bag535ag466egace1gb99af80ac0e9: *Suspicion lingers in her eyes. You'll have to take care in the future.*
h222af1e7g9203g49ceg9f7ag977aeba9e997: *Suspicion lingers in his eyes. You'll have to take care in the future.*
h18e0ab07gfd9dg4437g82d3g3e800acfca39: It isn't. But you'll be the first to known if I feel unwell.
h82e9c356g6edcg4ccdg96b0gea577e60ab8c: I didn't expect honesty. We're not exactly close.
hd4fc172dgee37g4236g8701g0c4fca5ec263: I was just trying to cast a spell. It didn't work.
h66615c00gee71g49e2gabdfg65fd997f43b7: That wasn't like any spell I've ever seen before.
h7af22aa7g2f82g4555g8650gf018d6d7a587: Whatever it was, it didn't look good.
hf0c458fag3695g4928g97e1gf548dbfc1af8: Silently recite an old chant. Let the familiar words anchor you.
h76328797gfefeg478eg801ag3749604e230f: The pain is too much. Cry out to Shar - beg for her protection.
hb361b923g4cc2g4f51gb293gaf2412b0c3ff: Don't worry. What it is, we're in this together.
h6bbf472dgdc2eg4b72ga790gdd62d564e0b1: I... thank you. But I'm sure it was nothing. I just... need a little space.
hac3e5a81gd2e3g4cc4g9eaeg2547d0a74d07: Pull yourself together. We've all got fears to wrestle with.
he586b255gdecbg4ea7g834bg5b66d2d2bc97: I know that. I had just hoped you might show some more understanding. Leave me alone, please.
ha1b7ec4fga235g45afgbf1fgf03d3262d386: I don't need your tough love. I need to be left alone. Now.
he5aba1dbgd26cg41dbga01cgc2ef91db6740: Not some sort of Sharran magic...?
hc09badd8g02fag4348g8836g9981b0f3ce69: No. I wish I knew what it was... but it's not that.
hc7204f2cgc932g4b40g85dbg515f7e6394a0: I said I don't know. Forget it.
hbb57f249g1f3bg4669ga205g1b643b6c6325: Could it be her tadpole? Ask how she feels.
haf104df9g1b85g4b9cg8bcag0cb25d3fcab9: I'm fine. It's passed, whatever it was...
h917d5181g10e6g4453g9ba8g0e6dfee56ea2: ... and stop looking at me like that. I'm not sprouting tentacles just yet.
hab9ae124g5453g4003ga64agf43dceaa4fc1: Use your shared connection. Enter her thoughts.
h97c77fd3g3adcg47d9ga83bgc73cf7c04351: *Uncertainty. Fear. Shadowheart genuinely doesn't know what just happened, but she's afraid of it.*
h39edd26cg55beg46bbg8b34g539ff2d655c3: 'Darkness protect me'? What did you mean by that?
h2c32e711ged90g4598g9347g07255b53ceda: I... it's difficult for me to talk about. I'm sorry.
hcc68d560g28f9g47c4gba69g3ed6f40a14ef: You're a Shar worshipper, aren't you?
h63121c27gff2fg4d15ga717g792c10178746: ... I should have been more discreet around you, clearly. Yes, you're right.
h863344b2g8097g4c97gbb90gab225a25c6be: I worship Shar, the Mistress of the Night.
h699a3584g67d2g4645gbb71ge1557aed157f: Don't make a fuss, Selûnite - we may be at odds, but I have more important concerns than you right now.
h0d133e2eg96feg48fbgabb3gab0f6ce35f99: Don't make a big fuss...? You've been lying to me!
h7c13353eg9cabg4bc2gbc87g28e880df7244: A lie of omission at most. I'm sure you have some skeletons of your own hidden away.
hf1472f6bg0a5ag4f77g9ba4g5c25b7eccd18: Secrecy is everything for Shar's children. It's our code, our creed, our shield.
he2aa00adg0edeg45c7g9b8agb9246f4cf2d1: I'm not sorry I kept this from you. Not one bit.
h4f84a4aegb923g407cg8529g9670cd8395ab: Though perhaps that might change, if you can show an open mind.
h95343acfg8d3fg48f2gbaccg5537deaa8741: Let's see how open-minded I can be then: tell me more.
h5047a764g36b5g407egaeedga632de03ce0f: Talk to me later. The day's been long enough already.
h13a82020g2e40g49a3g878bg53a770c00878: I don't know how I feel about this.
h3e922a88gd596g4a8ag8c74g47b69ec473e6: Who says you have to feel anything?
h3b31fdaag3dc7g49a7gaa2dga4b4e0245288: Gather your throughts. Then perhaps we can talk some more.
hb0fc6ad1g67ecg4f90ga99fgac895dedd472: We can discuss this later. But let's just try a little more honesty going foward.
h8e203f8fg1e35g406eg88e9g2354127c636f: All we can do is try, I suppose...
h8f26c878gfb22g4391g8381g13131ccb9f13: I can't trust you. Best if we travel separately for now.
h4a76c37bg7d0bg4a71gbd86g0e27790c4862: If you insist. Don't expect to fare well without me to save you.
hdfae9c63g4f23g4762g8ce9g90e7bcd42d00: It's been some time since I met another faithful of Shar. Are you versed in her teachings?
h723c1686g6f99g4155g9b6eg3cfb6bad518f: Of course I am. But we can talk about this later - I want to enjoy the still of the night.
ha1ee8cf4gbbe9g4685gb8f9g4b0271507105: You could have told me. How long were you going to keep this secret?
h1163e7a3g1378g4ed2ga165g989527e7c500: Forever, ideally. And you assume too much about what I can and cannot tell.
h8f1ea62cgd69ag4e7ag9bc0ge025e45e41a6: I didn't agree to join up with a Shar worshipper.
h4d2308c9g083fg48f5g9318gc4a156eee034: Then it's your own fault for not asking.
h45653d74gfa27g4289ga77eg7d0640121c37: Now that the truth's out, tell me more.
h13bb06edg657ag4df7g9508g0f8a0ef46db5: In future, I expect you to be honest. Let's leave it at that for now.
hbb67d9aeg316fg421egb528g2a4d5e691b0d: I don't care who you worship. We have bigger problems.
h612efcc9g07d3g4dc6g830fg1357dcfbfbf1: True. I didn't think you'd react so pragmatically. Perhaps I should have told you sooner.
h381d7e8ag9729g4281ga115g04e456b0d807: Shar is an abomination. You deceived me.
h54dc8ad9g75c5g4713g84dagf367cac364f7: Your blindness as much as my deception, Selûnite. We can talk about this later - if you're willing.
hf60aeefbg2991g46c7g9300gc036311e3e0a: I bow to Shar also. The Dark Lady must favour us, to have brought us together.
he0ac366bg7b46g4cdbg9d4egc8d3dd233ed9: I... yes, she must. I'll offer thanks to her in my prayers - and we should speak more later. Alone, ideally.
h3581f35ag47f8g4acagb118g6d40dfbc47bb: Fantastic. Monsters in our minds, and around our campfire.
h5351914cg6f71g4dc7gb6dbg34cadfdefb8e: Heavens forbid. We're all entitled to our secrets.
h78569623g14f0g4e8ag829dgffb11d0ad507: Knew there was something off about you. Wasn't expecting this though
hc29c49fdg89feg4912gb506g1f4eddbf036a: A Shar worshipper? Not my usual quarry - nor my usual ally.
h4bec80e6g2222g459dgb639gb081c45f4372: You worship Shar? Blimey. She and my beloved Mystra are not exactly friends.
ha92f78fdgb1c3g45bfgaa26gd5eddc7876f0: Now that you have the truth, please don't make a big fuss about it.
h4185bdc6ga6cdg44edgb42dg4b3ffdd97486: Don't be sorry - just tell me what you're hiding.
h2d75cf7dga79fg4a0bgbc23ge496976faa07: There's more to this. What aren't you telling me?
hcf659c6dg4cfdg462cgb019g58d6f16d8f42: You're not going to let this go, are you?
h95d9e464gd0a6g46b9g9adcg618dcc6fef88: It's nothing. Even if it was something, I'm clearly not going to tell you, am I? Let's go.
haccc52fbgc497g4de7g8edag4bf5f127bdc2: Use your shared connection. Enter her thoughts.
h8ceeb5f7g196dg4152g9878g63550c5b2c99: *You sense her trying to understand what just happened. She silently begs her goddess for guidance - Shar.*
hd125a89cg81a4g4d1ega73ag0f9be86218f9: Stop! If I want to tell you something, I'll use my mouth - understand?
hf0ff6785g6f44g4405gab63g5ee936678136: Fumble in my head again and I'll gut you.
